candidates.why: The selected COGS parent row is 'Cost of sales'. In the populated years, 'Cost of sales' equals 'Cost Of Goods Sold' plus 'Depreciation in COR/COGS' (e.g. 398.64 = 388.62 + 10.01), so this depreciation appears embedded in the selected COGS bucket rather than sitting outside it.
Generic depreciation row is blank in the operating section preview and does not provide a separate COGS D&A amount to add.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A should be added. 'Depreciation in COR/COGS' is a component of the selected 'Cost of sales' row, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.why: The selected parent row 'Selling expenses' already includes this amount; the populated years show 429.84 = 426.95 + 2.89, so this is embedded in the selected SG&A bucket.
The selected parent row 'Administrative expenses' already includes this amount; the populated years show 42.33 = 41.62 + 0.71, so this is embedded in the selected SG&A bucket.

The selected row 'Research and development expenses' already includes this amount; the populated years show 159.77 = 156.44 + 3.33. Since R&D is also selected for XRD, adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting.
This row is blank in the operating section preview, so there is no separate amortization amount to add.
Generic depreciation row is blank in the operating section preview and does not provide a separate SG&A D&A amount to add.

variables.notes: No separate XSGA D&A should be added. The explicit depreciation rows for selling, administrative, and R&D each reconcile exactly into the already selected parent expense rows, so they are embedded in XSGA_COMPONENTS.
